_comment: Pinned regression baseline for the coverage+ranking watchdog (Step 2 monitor). Source of truth for scripts/check-data-invariants.js (build-time, over src/data/*.ts). The runtime guard in wordpress-plugin/autonomous-it-insights/autonomous-it-insights.php (ait_snapshot_baseline()) MIRRORS these values and must be kept in sync. Pinned to ACTUAL current data (2026-06): secops intentionally carries 54 established vendors, not 50. Mins are floors that catch a collapse without false-flagging benign rebalancing; anchors are normalized lowercase substrings that must remain present AND tier leader|challenger.
